gt_sql: SELECT T2.Id FROM votes AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.UserId = 1465 ORDER BY T2.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p.Id
FROM posts p
JOIN votes v ON p.Id = v.PostId
WHERE v.UserId = 1465
ORDER BY p.FavoriteCount DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Among the posts that were voted by user 1465, what is the id of the most valuable post?
